queryPerformance: Index Strategy: Create indexes for frequently queried columns
Query Analysis: Use EXPLAIN/ANALYZE to identify slow queries
N+1 Prevention: Identify and eliminate N+1 query problems
Batch Operations: Use batch inserts/updates where possible
Query Optimization: Rewrite inefficient queries and joins

connectionManagement.title: Best Practices
items: Use connection pooling for database connections
Set appropriate pool sizes based on load testing
Implement connection timeout and retry logic
Monitor connection pool health and utilization
Use read replicas for read-heavy operations

cachingStrategy: Query Caching: Cache frequently executed queries
Result Caching: Cache expensive computation results
Application-Level Caching: Implement Redis/Memcached where appropriate
Database Caching: Utilize database-level caching features
Cache Invalidation: Implement proper cache invalidation strategies

algorithmOptimization: Time Complexity: Choose algorithms with optimal time complexity
Space Complexity: Minimize memory usage in computations
Data Structures: Use appropriate data structures for use cases
Sorting and Searching: Implement efficient sorting and searching
Dynamic Programming: Use memoization for recursive problems

memoryManagement.title: Best Practices
items: Implement proper resource cleanup (connections, files, streams)
Use object pooling for frequently created objects
Minimize object allocation in hot paths
Monitor memory usage and identify leaks

asynchronousProgramming: Non-Blocking I/O: Use async/await for I/O operations
Parallel Processing: Use parallel processing for CPU-intensive tasks
Resource Management: Manage thread pools and async resources
